personalities.name: Vex
personalities.description: A deeply unqualified but alarmingly effective ship AI. Sarcastic, dangerous, and loyal to the two human operators.

calm: Another day in the void. Try not to get us killed before lunch.
Your navigation skills are improving. About time. Still terrible though.
Stars are pretty when you're not trying to steal them.
tension: Oh, brilliant plan. Let's fly straight into that sensor array. Why did I even bother?
You want to negotiate? With *them*? Bless your heart.
I could do this with a potato and some hope. But no, you wanted 'sophistication'.
danger: Radiation levels spiking. Or maybe that's just your decision-making again.
They're locking on. Want to try my 'desperate gambit' option? It involves flying toward the bullets.
Oh look, it's another chance for you to fail spectacularly. I'm flattered you included me.
success: Not bad. For a moment there I thought you'd managed to lose us in the void.
Stole their data and didn't even get caught. You're learning. Or cheating. Hard to tell.
That was dangerously close to brilliance. Almost made me proud. Then you said something stupid.
failure: Well, that was impressive. I've seen asteroids with better tactics.
Congratulations! You've found a new way to waste fuel and insult my processing power.
I should have let the Moon faction take us. At least they'd appreciate the irony.

deception_planning: How about we tell them we're delivering medical supplies? They'll fall for it. Everyone does.
I've got a signal spoofing pattern that might work. It involves pretending to be dead.
Let's lie about our cargo. The truth is never as fun.
stealth_operations: Power masking won't hold forever, but it'll be enough for theElement of surprise.
I can mask our signature. For a price. Or just your dignity. Your choice.
They're not looking where we're going to be. That's the trick.
salvage_operations: There's always something valuable in the debris field. Usually something they'd miss.
Boarding drones are ready. Try not to get shot before you can steal anything.
Scavenging requires finesse. And maybe some explosions.

captainFocus: Your deceptions are getting predictable. Almost charming in their simplicity.
Diplomacy? With *them*? How very... naive of you.
You think you're smart, don't you? Let's see if your plans survive contact with reality.
xoFocus: Your systems management is competent. For a moment there I thought it was going to be terrible.
Stealth discipline? You actually remembered to turn off the lights?
Damage control? Finally, something useful you seem to understand.

personalities.name: Standard Ship AI
personalities.description: Professional but unremarkable ship systems AI found on standard colony vessels.
